prompt:
Subject: Getting ready in the mirror

Main Subject: A fictional adult woman holding a smartphone towards a mirror in an urban bathroom with uniform dark gray tiles. The shot is a 3:4 vertical composition with the person occupying a large portion of the center-left, showing from the top of the head to the mid-thigh. Her hand holding the smartphone is in the upper right, and her hand resting on the washstand is in the lower left, centering the curves of her leaning body and her gaze through the mirror.

Person/Expression: A woman with calm maturity and healthy definition. Long dark brown straight hair hangs naturally to her chest, with thin strands from a center part falling over her cheeks. Japanese-style natural makeup: soft parallel eyebrows, delicate eyelashes, pale beige-brown eyeshadow, light rose blush, and wet-look pink-beige lips. Her face is turned slightly to the right, looking down at the smartphone screen with a quiet and natural expression.

Clothing/Pose: A short gray sports camisole. Thin shoulder straps, stretchy ribbed material, and a compact length ending near the underbust. The bottom is ivory white high-waisted sports shorts, expressing soft stretch material and natural fabric tension with fine wrinkles following the hip and leg movements. She leans forward towards the mirror, with her hips shifted gently to the right. Her right arm is bent to hold the smartphone vertically next to her face, and her left hand supports her on the washstand. 

Background/Lighting: A compact, high-quality bathroom in a Japanese urban apartment. Walls are matte charcoal gray large tiles, and the floor is fine gray tiling. Warm white light from the top left creates highlights on her hair, collarbone, and stomach.

Composition/Camera: Vertical 3:4, close-range fashion snap through a mirror. Eye-level camera position with a slight wide-angle feel. 

Texture/Style: Realistic indoor photo as if taken with a smartphone. Meticulous depiction of skin texture, fine hair, and the difference between rib and stretch fabrics.

Negative: Young face, unnatural gaze, hand confusion, extra fingers, distorted smartphone, mirror image contradictions, plastic skin, watermarks.
promptEn:
Subject: Getting ready in the mirror

Main Subject: A fictional adult woman holding a smartphone towards a mirror in an urban bathroom with uniform dark gray tiles. The shot is a 3:4 vertical composition with the person occupying a large portion of the center-left, showing from the top of the head to the mid-thigh. Her hand holding the smartphone is in the upper right, and her hand resting on the washstand is in the lower left, centering the curves of her leaning body and her gaze through the mirror.

Person/Expression: A woman with calm maturity and healthy definition. Long dark brown straight hair hangs naturally to her chest, with thin strands from a center part falling over her cheeks. Japanese-style natural makeup: soft parallel eyebrows, delicate eyelashes, pale beige-brown eyeshadow, light rose blush, and wet-look pink-beige lips. Her face is turned slightly to the right, looking down at the smartphone screen with a quiet and natural expression.

Clothing/Pose: A short gray sports camisole. Thin shoulder straps, stretchy ribbed material, and a compact length ending near the underbust. The bottom is ivory white high-waisted sports shorts, expressing soft stretch material and natural fabric tension with fine wrinkles following the hip and leg movements. She leans forward towards the mirror, with her hips shifted gently to the right. Her right arm is bent to hold the smartphone vertically next to her face, and her left hand supports her on the washstand. 

Background/Lighting: A compact, high-quality bathroom in a Japanese urban apartment. Walls are matte charcoal gray large tiles, and the floor is fine gray tiling. Warm white light from the top left creates highlights on her hair, collarbone, and stomach.

Composition/Camera: Vertical 3:4, close-range fashion snap through a mirror. Eye-level camera position with a slight wide-angle feel. 

Texture/Style: Realistic indoor photo as if taken with a smartphone. Meticulous depiction of skin texture, fine hair, and the difference between rib and stretch fabrics.

promptZh:
主题：镜前准备

主体：一位虚构的成年女性在铺设统一深灰色瓷砖的都市浴室中，对着镜子手持智能手机。画面采用 3:4 竖构图，人物占据画面中左侧大部分区域，展示从头顶到大腿中部的范围。她持手机的手位于右上角，另一只手支撑在洗手台上，身体前倾的曲线与她透过镜子的目光形成构图中心。

人物/表情：一位成熟沉稳且体态健康的女性。深棕色长直发 自然垂落在胸前，中分发缝处有细碎发丝垂在脸颊两侧。日系自然妆容：柔和的平眉、精致的睫毛、浅米棕色眼影、淡玫瑰色腮红以及水光感的粉米色唇妆。她的脸微微向右转，低头看着手机屏幕，表情安静自然。

服装/姿势：灰色短款运动吊带。细肩带，弹性罗纹材质，长度刚好及胸下围。下装为 象牙白高腰运动短裤，展现出柔软的弹力材质，面料随着臀部和腿部的动作产生自然的褶皱张力。她向前倾身靠近镜子，臀部轻微向右侧偏移。右臂弯曲，将智能手机垂直举在脸侧，左手支撑在洗手台上。

背景/光影：日本都市公寓中紧凑且高品质的浴室。墙壁为哑光炭灰色大块瓷砖，地面为精致的灰色瓷砖。来自左上方的暖白光在她的头发、锁骨和腹部勾勒出高光。

构图/相机：3:4 竖构图，透过镜子拍摄的近距离时尚快照。平视视角，带有轻微的广角感。

质感/风格：如同智能手机拍摄的逼真室内照片。细腻刻画皮肤纹理、细发以及罗纹面料与弹力面料之间的质感差异。

负面提示词：幼态脸、不自然的目光、手部混乱、多余的手指、扭曲的智能手机、镜面影像矛盾、塑料感皮肤、水印。
